productInsights: Default enforcement mode changed guide→monitor (commit a84e172, #1359). User-facing behavior change — marketing should lead with 'monitor mode lets teams see what's happening before committing to enforcement'. Strong adoption angle vs competitors.
5th governed driver: Goose (Block) added, DeepAgents removed. 'Works with any AI coding agent' story now covers Claude Code, Codex CLI, Copilot CLI, Gemini CLI, Goose — the full landscape.

Persistent site stat drift pattern: invariant, pattern, event kind, and CLI counts all drift as code evolves. Recommend build-time sync script to auto-patch site/index.html stats from source counts at deploy time (repeated recommendation, still unactioned — should become an engineering issue).
grep -c 'name:' for invariant count is unreliable — returns 26 due to false positives (interface definition + hostname:port substring). Use grep '^    name:' or manual count going forward.
PR #1388 merged cleanly — conference P0 complete. Post-May-6-talk attendees will land on a README with GitHub Stars social proof, clear install path, and cloud onboarding CTA above the fold.
